_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: DCTS LiveKit
author: marcel@dcts.community
description: LiveKit Server for DCTS voice and video chat.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
export HOME=/mnt/server
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

echo "Fetching latest LiveKit release..."
LATEST_VERSION=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/livekit/livekit/releases/latest | grep '"tag_name":' | head -n 1 | sed -E 's/.*"v([^"]+)".*/\1/')
echo "Installing LiveKit v${LATEST_VERSION}..."
wget "https://github.com/livekit/livekit/releases/latest/download/livekit-server_${LATEST_VERSION}_linux_amd64.tar.gz"
tar -xzf livekit-server_${LATEST_VERSION}_linux_amd64.tar.gz livekit-server
rm livekit-server_${LATEST_VERSION}_linux_amd64.tar.gz
chmod +x livekit-server
echo "LiveKit installation complete."

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: Main HTTP port for the LiveKit API (Default 7880).

variables.name: LiveKit YAML Path
variables.description: Path to the livekit.yaml configuration file.
